fetchSamples.sample: <fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical"> <entity name="kyn_agenttenantwide"> <attribute name="kyn_agenttenantwideid" /> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="kyn_name" descending="false" /> </entity> </fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical"> <entity name="kyn_agenttenantwide"> <attribute name="kyn_agenttenantwideid" /> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical" distinct="true"> <entity name="kyn_agenttenantwide"> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="kyn_authenticationjson" /> <attribute name="kyn_createdat" /> <attribute name="kyn_createdby" /> <attribute name="kyn_createdin" /> <attribute name="kyn_lastpublishedat" /> <attribute name="kyn_location" /> <attribute name="kyn_modeljson" /> <attribute name="kyn_orchestrationjson" /> <order attribute="kyn_createdat" descending="true" /> <attribute name="kyn_owneremail" /> <attribute name="kyn_agenttenantwideid" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="1" /> <condition attribute="modifiedon" operator="this-week" /> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

sample.name: Quick Find Active agent tenant wides

fetchSamples.sample: <fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical"> <entity name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformes"> <attribute name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformesid" /> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="kyn_recipientemail" /> <attribute name="kyn_reportmodecode" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="kyn_name" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> </filter> <filter type="or" isquickfindfields="1"> <condition attribute="kyn_name" operator="like" value="{0}" /> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical"> <entity name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformes"> <attribute name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformesid" /> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="kyn_recipientemail" /> <attribute name="kyn_reportmodecode" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="kyn_name" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> </filter> </entity> </fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" mapping="logical"> <entity name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformes"> <attribute name="kyn_suscripcionesdeinformesid" /> <attribute name="kyn_name" /> <attribute name="kyn_recipientemail" /> <attribute name="kyn_reportmodecode" /> <attribute name="createdon" /> <order attribute="kyn_name" descending="false" /> <filter type="and"> <condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0" /> </filter> </entity> </fetch>
